decisions.rationale: Observation already resolves to corridor_34th-st-busway (base_record_id matches). The source '2011_34th_sbs_comments_on_proposed_design' is already associated with this record. The broader limits 'FDR Drive to Twelfth Avenue' from block p002_c0011 describe the flier distribution outreach area for the SBS public meetings, not the busway corridor limits — the document is explicitly about the 34th Street SBS project. No other registry record matches this corridor, and the observation is correctly placed at its base_record_id.

evidence_refs.source_quote: In addition, DOT distributed fliers door-to-door to every storefront business and accessible building along 34 th Street between the FDR Drive and Twelfth Avenue.
Summary of Public Comments on the Proposed Design for 34 th Street Select Bus Service (SBS)
